mnemonics: Best Rockers Understand Tenacious Elephants Frequently Sorting
Bunnies Render Unwanted Tasks Efficiently Freshly Sorted
keyPoints: Selection Sort: Compare adjacent elements, swap if necessary and repeat until entire array is sorted.
Bubble Sort: Repeat process of comparing adjacent elements and swapping if necessary until no more swaps are needed, indicating the array is sorted.
Time complexity: Selection Sort - O(n^2), Bubble Sort - O(n^2) in the worst case scenario.
Space complexity: O(1) as it only requires a constant amount of space to store temporary variables and indices.
